Finding.Description: Low Level Requirements document LL-8.xml content was not provided. Without LL-8 content, we cannot verify refinements to HL requirements, dependency graphs, or traceability (including interactions with LL-LOC-7.1) and naming consistency.
Finding.Solution: Provide the Low Level Requirements document LL-8.xml (or paste its contents), ensuring that LL-8.x exist, refine the appropriate HL requirements, and declare necessary DependsOn relationships. After delivery, I will generate a formal Answer document with Findings, Justifications, and Implementations, and perform full traceability verification (including LL-LOC-7.1 interactions and naming propagation such as Cell Classification).
